items.title: China Airlines rides Taiwan's AI boom to record cargo profits
items.summary: China Airlines said demand tied to artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure and semiconductor shipments is helping fuel a strong rebound in air cargo, underscoring Taiwan's growing importance at the center of the global technology supply chain.

items.title: Computex 2026 adds robotics zone, Taiwan supply chain gathers
items.summary: Computex 2026 will add a robotics zone for the first time, drawing Taiwan's full ecosystem of sensors, motors, reducers, and system integrators, as Nvidia and AMD prepare to showcase robotics at CES 2026. The move has already stirred strong industry interest as the show extends big tech's robotics roadmap.

items.title: Samsung foundry targets robotics, auto AI chips with Cadence platform
items.summary: Samsung Electronics is preparing to expand its foundry push into physical AI semiconductors through a chiplet platform developed with Cadence, targeting chips for robotics, automotive systems, drones, and industrial automation, ETNews reported, citing industry sources.

items.title: UMC readies price hikes, kicks off 2027 customer talks
items.summary: UMC held its shareholders' meeting on May 27, with CEO Jason Wang saying that as AI applications expand rapidly, long-term semiconductor demand still has room for growth. In addition to deepening its strengths in mature and specialty processes, UMC is also advancing next-generation technologies, including a US-based 12nm FinFET platform, advanced packaging, and silicon photonics, to prepare for future operating growth.

items.title: Tsang Yow, a expands into high-end semiconductor equipment, plans Malaysia ramp in 4Q26
items.summary: Tsang Yow, a major drivetrain manufacturer, expanded into high-end semiconductor equipment and planned a Malaysia production ramp-up in the fourth quarter of 2026 after posting 2025 consolidated revenue of NT$10.5 billion (US$334 million), up 0.3% year on year, with gross margin rising to 33% and net profit attributable to the parent company of NT$140 million. Earnings per share were NT$1.36, and executives said product-mix optimization, equipment replacement, inventory reduction, and tighter co

items.title: Laster Tech enters the robot joint control supply chain and wins North American auto orders
items.summary: Laster Tech announced it had broken into the robot joint control module supply chain and secured North American vehicle orders for its new Mexico plant, with small-volume robot shipments slated to begin in the third quarter of 2026 and vehicle deliveries targeted to start in the first quarter of 2027. The moves were presented as a strategic extension from the firm’s automotive electronics expertise into embodied intelligence robotics and as a step to strengthen local North American supply

items.title: Taiwan's GLT diversifies into auto and medical markets, expands Southeast Asia production
items.summary: Taiwan-based Global Lighting Technologies (GLT), a specialist in optical microstructure solutions, is accelerating its Southeast Asia expansion as global tariff pressures and geopolitical uncertainty continue to weigh on customer demand and product development cycles, while expanding into higher-growth sectors such as automotive electronics, biotech, and medical devices.

items.title: Ezconn moves up AI optics chain with CPO and silicon photonics
items.summary: Ezconn expects US cloud providers' AI data center expansion to sustain demand for high core count optical products through at least 2029, according to President Ying-hua Chang.

items.title: Marvell AI 訂單爆發，上修未來財測衝近 115 億美元
items.summary: 根據彭博社報導，AI 資料中心需求持續升溫，帶動高速網通與客製化晶片市場成長。網通晶片大廠 Marvell T […]

items.title: 每日椽真：Google人形機器人導入新皮膚 | 高純度氫氣助攻半導體減碳布局 | 中國AI晶片正建立新準入制
items.summary: 雷虎手握美國防部認證，2025年就表示會爭取這項DDP大單。據了解，該計畫預計目標在2027年前分四階段淘汰制，採購超過30萬架低成本的單程攻擊無人機，而首批3萬架訂單預計於2026年7月前交付。台積電傳將大砍15%

items.title: Bigstack推動CubeCOS開源引力 擴大生態系加速雲原生落地
items.summary: 虛擬化授權重整與私有AI浪潮交會，企業IT轉型壓力驟升，資料不出境、地端GPU與雲原生架構需求同步湧現。IT部門面臨的不只是系統升級，而是治理、算力與資料流的全方位調整。在此背景下，Bigstack於Bigshare 2026技術交流峰會以「開放引力」為主軸，聚焦開源如何降低技術綁定風險、提升架構自主性，從而加速雲端轉型進程

items.title: 輔信科技展示Intel Core Ultra迷你電腦 支援代理型AI部署
items.summary: 隨著生成式AI逐步從內容生成走向任務執行與工作流程協作，代理式AI（Agentic AI）正成為企業AI應用的重要發展方向。輔信科技股份有限公司（股票代碼：2405）將於COMPUTEX 2026展示多款搭載Intel Core

items.title: AI晶片測試邁向高頻高速時代 Smiths Interconnect聚焦訊號與散熱兩
items.summary: 隨著晶片製造技術持續向先進製程邁進，加上生成式AI、高效能運算（HPC）與大型資料中心需求快速成長，帶動AI晶片朝向更高頻寬、更大I/O數量與更高功耗發展。只是隨著2.5D

items.title: 高通ASIC客戶不只字節跳動一家？　傳還有美系CSP專案醞釀
items.summary: 高通（Qualcomm）曾在上一次的財報會議提及，已成功取得首波特用晶片（ASIC）客戶訂單，並將在下一次的投資人活動上揭露。而據彭博（Bloomberg）等報導，首發大客戶是開發TikTok的字節跳動，預計共採購數百萬顆，意味著高通也成功打進雲端ASIC市場。而根據DIGITIMES進一步探索，除了印證該消息屬實外

items.title: NVIDIA進駐北士科AI拋電力需求　台電「雙軌策略」推動變電所籌設
items.summary: NVIDIA台灣新總部預計2026年底動工、2030年正式啟用，執行長黃仁勳喊話「台灣需要更多電力」。考量NVIDIA進駐帶動的AI產業聚落，台電評估，北士科供電需求約180MW，為配合NVIDIA完工時程，台電規劃「雙軌推動」建立臨時和正式變電所，臨時變電所預計20個月內可完工，初步提供60MW供電容量。NVID

items.title: 三星薪資改革訴求擴散　三星電機、SDC與SDI壓力升溫
items.summary: 三星電子（Samsung Electronics）勞資雙方達成初步協議，雖然化解「半導體停擺」危機，但後續衝擊卻有蔓延至整個三星集團（Samsung Group）的態勢。消息傳出，隨著半導體相關部門高額績效獎金制度及大規模補償方案的消息曝光，三星電機（Semco）與三星顯示器（Samsung

items.title: 科技1分鐘：極致協同設計（Extreme Co-Design）
items.summary: NVIDIA執行長黃仁勳曾在2026年3月公開訪談中談到「極致協同設計」（Extreme Co-Design），指出AI運算問題已無法只靠單一電腦或單顆GPU解決，而是必須從演算法拆分、資料分流、模型切割，到晶片、系統、網路與軟體堆疊一併設計。這個概念並非AI時代才出現。早在高效能運算（HPC）領域，Co-

items.title: SK海力士離職率降至1%、三星仍達10%　績效共享成關鍵
items.summary: 分析指出，受惠於半導體景氣熱潮，加上持續創下歷史性業績與績效獎金，SK海力士（SK Hynix）的離職率逐年下降，至2024年已降至1%。相較之下，三星電子（Samsung Electronics）離職率雖呈現下降趨勢，但以全球標準計算仍維持10%

items.title: 是方中科AIDC租用意向破5成　2H26不排除再加碼建置
items.summary: 受惠於AI算力爆發，是方IDC機房與雲端服務持續放量。是方27日召開股東會，會中承認2025年財報。董事長邵泓嘉與總經理劉耀元會後受訪時指出，聯雲智能資料中心（LY2）進駐率預計在2027年底達到9成以上，至於原定2028年上線的第四座中科AIDC，雖然目前尚未動工，但租用意向書已突破5成，下半年也不排除再釋出新的AI

items.title: 美國太空軍砸4.4億美元　Viasat、Intelsat搶下抗干擾衛星訂單
items.summary: 美國太空軍5月22日拍板，由Viasat與Intelsat General Communications拿下合計4.377億美元合約，替Protected Tactical Satellite Communications-Global（PTS-

items.title: 美國重金扶持量子產業　IBM布局量子晶圓代工版圖
items.summary: 量子運算正逐漸成為美國政府戰略算力布局的下一個主戰場。特別是聯邦政府對關鍵科技的金援，已不再侷限於半導體晶圓廠與AI基礎設施，而是進一步延伸至量子運算、量子晶片製造與量子系統整合領域。川普政府日前宣布，將向9家量子運算相關企業投入合計20億美元資金，並以取得少數股權方式支持產業發展，將這項新興技術列為經濟與國家安全優先領域

items.title: AI資料中心熱潮驅動　全球DRAM營收1Q26飆近1,000億美元
items.summary: 近日市調報告指出，2026年第1季全球DRAM營收較2025年第4季飆升80%，也較2025年同期大增260%，創下970億美元的歷史新高。三星電子（Samsung Electronics）記憶體持續以38%市佔坐穩市佔龍頭，SK海力士（SK

items.title: 三星與益華推5奈米實體AI小晶片平台　藉機掌握代工機會
items.summary: 三星電子（Samsung Electronics）將與益華電腦（Cadence）攜手，預定於2027年初完成實體AI（Physical AI）小晶片（Chiplet）平台的設計定案（tape-out），瞄準車用、機器人、工業自動化等應用領域，旨在吸引相關IC設計業者採用三星5奈米代工製程。根據韓媒ET

items.title: 群創加速轉型　洪進揚鎖定三大策略抓緊高毛利
items.summary: 群創光電27日舉行股東常會，順利通過各項議案。董事長洪進揚表示，2026年將全面加速轉型進程，主要聚焦在半導體先進封裝、智慧座艙以及推動高毛利面板應用。隨著進入「666規劃藍圖」的第2個6年，群創透過不同角

items.title: 南韓IC設計業績回溫仍有遺憾　系統半導體未能擠進全球列強
items.summary: 全球半導體市場進入超級週期，在記憶體晶片領域主導全球市場的南韓因而備受矚目，不僅記憶體雙雄三星電子（Samsung Electronics）與SK海力士（SK Hynix），以中小規模為主的南韓IC設計企業也呈現明顯業績改善。據韓媒Financial

items.title: 大廠搶產能願投資建廠　SK海力士傳將提議轉化為合約籌碼
items.summary: 日前有報導稱，全球科技大廠為與SK海力士（SK Hynix）合作，紛紛提出願意資助晶圓廠建設及設備採購費用以作為籌碼。最新傳出SK海力士婉拒這些提議的同時，正將其作為簽訂長期供應合約的談判籌碼。據韓媒Chosun

items.title: Arm技術授權助攻　馬來西亞IC設計新星Oppstar獲日本訂單
items.summary: 馬來西亞IC設計公司Oppstar獲得來自TAI（Tokyo Artisan Intelligence）訂單，價值290萬美元。馬來西亞希望能夠加強在IC設計領域的發展，如今也成功獲得日本客戶青睞。根據The Edge Malaysia以及馬新社（Bernama）報導，Oppstar提交馬來西亞交易所（Bursa

items.title: 華為韜定律開啟另一DeepSeek時刻？　巧妙繞開ASML限制
items.summary: 華為近期在2026年IEEE電路與系統國際研討會上，揭露名為「韜（&tau

items.title: 【動物農莊】三星晶圓代工老二地位危機！英特爾挾蘋果訂單強勢來襲
items.summary: 英特爾（Intel）近日在晶圓代工市場發動全面攻勢，相繼爭取蘋果（Apple）、NVIDIA、亞馬遜（Amazon）等核心大廠訂單，並挾美國政府補貼，在2奈米市場搶先卡位。英特爾來勢洶洶，似乎讓長期穩居全球代工第二的三星電子（Samsung

items.title: 2027年將迎光通訊1.6T爆發期　中國基板出口管制露曙光
items.summary: 砷化鎵（GaAs）磊晶片（Epi）業者全新光電表示，接收端PD和發射端VCSEL、CW laser皆已量產，2026年光通訊主力應用為800 G，2027年預估為1.

items.summary:
The semiconductor industry is entering a transformative new phase, driven by the convergence of artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and increasingly complex chip architectures. items.summary: 封測大廠日月光半導體今天宣布，開發出 310×310mm 面板級封裝（Panel-Level Packagin […]

items.title: 彭博：三台人經日本走私輝達 AI 晶片銷往中國，至少一批闖關成功
items.summary: 檢方查獲 3 人涉違法將搭載輝達高階 AI 晶片的伺服器銷往中國。外媒稱，犯嫌先將伺服器運至日本再運往中國，至 […]

items.title: TSMC CEO promises bonus growth above 30% in 2026 if performance holds
items.summary: TSMC chairman and CEO C.C. Wei personally addressed employees at a company-wide meeting on the morning of May 27, making a direct commitment on bonuses after days of backlash over reports of a 15% cut.

items.title: 黃仁勳喊話台灣需要更多電，經長：至 2034 年供電無虞
items.summary: 輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳今天提及台灣需要更多電力。對此，經濟部長龔明鑫今天表示，目前已盤點至 2034 […]

items.title: Samsung reportedly to expand Vietnam footprint with new memory chip testing plant
items.summary: Samsung Electronics plans to invest VND39 trillion (approx. US$1.5 billion) in a new semiconductor testing facility in northern Vietnam, according to documents reviewed by Reuters, marking the company's first chip testing plant in the country as global memory demand surges amid the AI boom.

items.title: Taiwan's Wah Lee expands into specialty gases as materials costs are passed on quarterly
items.summary: Wah Lee Industrial said it has formally moved into investments in standard gases and other supplies needed by wafer fabs, with its Tainan logistics center set to open in the second half of 2026 to support future growth. Chairman Gary Chang also confirmed that the company will pass on higher costs for semiconductor and PCB products quarterly as raw material prices climb.

items.title: From boom-bust to structural growth? Memory's US$1 trillion moment puts AI thesis to the test
items.summary: First Micron, then SK Hynix, join the trillion-dollar club, capping an extraordinary repricing of an industry once dismissed as a commodity play. The milestone is more than a valuation story: it crystallizes a structural debate about whether AI has permanently transformed memory's earnings profile, a bubble concern as Chinese rivals ramp capacity, and a sharpening geopolitical contest over who controls the bandwidth backbone of artificial intelligence.

items.title: 輝達 Vera CPU 首測曝光，效能超車 AMD 英特爾
items.summary: 根據 Phoronix 報導，輝達首批 Vera CPU 基準測試結果正式曝光，不僅性能大幅超越前代 Grac […]

items.title: 黃仁勳示警沒有能源就沒有經濟成長！全球缺電危機帶動能源 ETF 狂飆 14%
items.summary: 輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳近日再度造訪台灣，一句「如果沒有能源，就無法實現經濟成長」，再度引爆各界對 A […]

items.title: Yulon advances AI-driven transformation to boost domestic production and exports
items.summary: Yulon Motor Group outlined its 2025 results and 2026 outlook at its annual shareholders' meeting on May 27, announcing continued domestic production and export pushes while deploying artificial intelligence (AI) to strengthen competitiveness and drive transformation. The company reported that 2025 stand-alone revenue was NT$16.655 billion, operating profit was NT$529 million, net profit was NT$979 million, and earnings per share were NT$0.93, while consolidated revenue for 2025 reached NT$72.355

items.title: Sino-American Silicon taps AI to tackle Taiwan's green power crunch
items.summary: Sino-American Silicon Products (SAS) is turning to AI-based power management as Taiwan's green-power shortage persists, and electricity demand from advanced chipmaking and AI data centers continues to rise.

items.title: TAITRA says Computex participating firms exceed US$10 trillion in market value
items.summary: Computex 2026 is set to officially open in Taipei, and Taiwan External Trade Development Council (TAITRA) Chairman James C.F. Huang has stated that the combined market capitalization of foreign companies participating in forums and keynote sessions at this year's event exceeds US$10 trillion. He also said that TAITRA has allocated the entire Taipei International Convention Center (TICC) exclusively to Nvidia for GTC Taipei 2026.

items.title: 魏哲家：今年員工分紅金額多 30%，鼓勵可買自家股票保證生活無虞
items.summary: 晶圓代工龍頭台積電傳出因為要調整員工分红比例，引發部分員工反彈，並揚言罷工、組工會一事，董事長暨總裁魏哲家特地 […]

items.title: Qualcomm and ByteDance's rumored AI ASIC deal signals potential shift in China's data center chip supply
items.summary: The agreement between Qualcomm and ByteDance positions the former for large-scale AI ASIC demand from the latter, as reported by Bloomberg, but market viability remains uncertain amid intense AI chip competition, evolving China procurement preferences, and regulatory pressures affecting cross-border semiconductor adoption.

items.title: IREN signs US$1.6bn Dell deal for Blackwell AI systems to expand Texas data center capacity
items.summary: IREN Limited has signed a purchase agreement with Dell Technologies for air-cooled Blackwell-based systems intended to support its previously announced five-year US$3.4bn managed services AI cloud contract. The deal forms part of its broader effort to expand AI compute capacity and shorten deployment timelines for large-scale GPU infrastructure.

items.title: WinWay weighs Texas shift after AI chip testing surge in North America
items.summary: US efforts to rebuild its semiconductor supply chain are exposing a critical gap in domestic packaging and testing capacity, a bottleneck that industry sources expect to ease only after 2028 as the US OSAT ecosystem gradually takes shape.

items.title: ICP DAS expands semiconductor controller orders and accelerates TPU medical pivot, plans factory expansion
items.summary: Industrial computer maker ICP DAS held an investor briefing on May 26 to outline a 2026 strategy focused on two main priorities: expanding semiconductor equipment controller operations and accelerating a shift into medical-grade thermoplastic polyurethane (TPU) semi-finished products. Executives said the moves aim to capture growing measurement and control-module demand from semiconductor-equipment customers and to open new TPU accounts in Japan, China, Europe, and the US.

items.title: Daxin Materials advances into Low Dk and Low Df market for booming AI server and LEO satellite applications
items.summary: Taiwan-based Daxin Materials posted stronger revenue and profitability in 2025 as rapid growth in semiconductor materials offset a still-cautious display market recovery, with AI- and HPC-driven demand emerging as the company's primary growth engine.

items.title: Jensen Huang: Taiwan is center of AI revolution, with US$150 billion in capex powering local ecosystem
items.summary: Nvidia held an "employee town hall" on the morning of May 27 at the T17 and T18 sites in Beitou-Shilin Technology Park (BSTP), where CEO Jensen Huang met staff, gave away Dom Pérignon, and framed Taiwan as central to the company's AI expansion. Taipei Mayor Wayne Chiang attended only as a "guest."

items.title: Global DRAM revenue surges toward US$100 billion in 1Q26 on AI-driven demand
items.summary: Global DRAM revenue climbed sharply in the first quarter of 2026, approaching the US$100 billion threshold as artificial intelligence demand and tight supply conditions pushed prices higher across the memory market, according to Counterpoint Research.

items.title: China clears 9 domestic AI chips for state procurement
items.summary: China has formally brought AI chips into its national security and reliability evaluation framework for the first time, marking a further expansion of the country's Information Technology Application Innovation procurement policy into AI computing infrastructure.

items.title: Trusted Convergence Governance: Preserving Admissibility Integrity Across Heterogeneous Semiconductor Systems
items.summary:
As semiconductor systems evolve toward heterogeneous integration, chiplets, 2.5D and 3D packaging, distributed observability, runtime adaptation, Fleet Learning, and lifecycle convergence governance, the industry is entering a fundamentally new operational reality.

Convergence decisions are no longer driven only…
